title: antennaria dioica var. hyperborea
intro: Antennaria dioica var. hyperborea, commonly known as woolly plantain, is a perennial plant species within the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Woolly plantain can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
